allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F })
